name: Mercenaries 2 Experimental Mods
description: Experimental mods for Mercenaries 2: World in Flames.

mods.name: Lua Bridge
mods.description: Exposes the game's internal Lua state over a localhost TCP port.

mods.name: Dev Cheat Menu
mods.description: Binds a key (default: Insert) to trigger the built-in developer cheat menu.

mods.name: Debug Overlay
mods.description: Custom Direct3D9 screen overlay for real-time debugging stats.
